audit_items.proof_trace: Both ber_get_option and ber_set_option validate outvalue/invalue non-NULL at entry (L39-43, L131-135) before any dereference. The item==NULL branches (L45-77, L137-194) return on every code path, guaranteeing that ber=item and sb=item are non-NULL at L79-80 and L196-197. The auxiliary pointer f (L168-169) is derived from already-verified non-NULL invalue, and ber_int_memory_fns is set to a static address (L178) before use. No dereference of a potentially-NULL pointer was found.
